description: Sector overlay for software providers, IT service providers, digital platforms, cloud/e-government vendors, cybersecurity service providers, and technology documentation in Ghana.

metadata.scope: Ghana-only sector overlay controls for Technology. Intended to be used with ghana_core_control_library.
metadata.source_note: Source basis is mapped from official Ghana legal/regulatory sources available at rule-pack publication time. This starter pack is not legal advice and requires expert validation before production reliance.
metadata.external_knowledge_policy: No external knowledge is introduced during document evaluation. Regulatory source mappings live only in this versioned rule pack.

primary_sources.name: National Information Technology Agency Act, 2008 (Act 771) / NITA mandate
Data Protection Act, 2012 (Act 843)
used_for: personal data processing and controller/processor registration

rules.title: NITA, IT-service, or ICT standards evidence is present
rules.summary: Checks for NITA registration, IT service provider evidence, ICT standards, e-government, certification, or technology-service compliance.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified Ghana legal/compliance reviewer must confirm applicability, legal sufficiency, source currency, and whether absence of textual evidence should be treated as non-compliance.

rules.title: Cybersecurity service provider licensing or accreditation evidence is present where applicable
rules.summary: Checks for CSA licence, cybersecurity service provider, cybersecurity establishment accreditation, professional accreditation, or VAPT/GRC/managed service evidence.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified Ghana legal/compliance reviewer must confirm applicability, legal sufficiency, source currency, and whether absence of textual evidence should be treated as non-compliance.

rules.title: Data-controller, processor, privacy, or data-protection controls are documented
rules.summary: Checks for privacy notice, data protection, controller/processor, consent, data subject rights, retention, security, or DPC registration evidence.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified Ghana legal/compliance reviewer must confirm applicability, legal sufficiency, source currency, and whether absence of textual evidence should be treated as non-compliance.

rules.title: Incident response, vulnerability, access-control, or security-governance evidence is present
rules.summary: Checks for incident response, vulnerability management, access control, monitoring, encryption, backup, risk assessment, or GovCert/CERT evidence.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified Ghana legal/compliance reviewer must confirm applicability, legal sufficiency, source currency, and whether absence of textual evidence should be treated as non-compliance.
